misc: Known for deliberating his next shot for a long time, leading to somewhat slow play
biography: Panu is a golfer renowned for his tactical approach to the game. While the location of his home club remains a mystery, his presence has been felt in past Hector Trophée tournaments.

Known for a meticulous and, some might jest, somewhat slow deliberation over each shot, Panu has nonetheless proven his mettle in this competition, securing the coveted Hector Trophée on one occasion.

With 3 appearances in past Hector Trophée events, Panu has demonstrated a commitment to the tournament, and while he might be considered retired, the possibility remains open for a surprising return to the greens.
